positive: A highly detailed cyberpunk cityscape viewed from above, dominated by neon signs, flying vehicles, and rain-slicked metallic streets. Anime aesthetic, deep blues and electric pinks, volumetric lighting, cinematic composition, intricate mechanical details, high resolution, concept art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, flat colors, cartoonish, soft edges, simplistic
